underlying_goal: Enhance an existing Dota 2 squad stats web page with impressive visuals and create a script to easily update the stats data
friction_detail: The update-stats.sh script failed with a regex matching error on 'var P = [...]' pattern, and Claude ran out of usage before fixing it.
brief_summary: User wanted their Dota 2 squad stats page visually enhanced and a refresh script created; the page overhaul was successfully deployed but the update script had a bug that couldn't be fixed due to usage limits.
